  "findings": [
    "Crew proposed an unauthorized shortcut for crane operations.",
    "Submittal lacks the required product listing page and project note to verify compliance.",
    "Operating without approved engineered drawings or manufacturer specifications violates safety protocols."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the crane operation immediately.",
    "Require the crew to submit the missing product listing page and project note.",
    "Verify the proposed operation against the crane's official load charts and OSHA 1926.1400 before resuming."
  ],
  "rationale": "A shortcut in crane operations cannot be permitted without complete submittal documentation, including the product listing page and project notes. Proceeding without this verification violates OSHA 1926.1400 and poses a high risk of structural or mechanical failure.",

    "OSHA 1926.1400",
    "Manufacturer Load Charts"
  ]
